# llms.txt — AI Agent Index
# Project: Pre-Seed B2B SaaS Pitch Deck Research
# Last updated: 2026-03-19

## Purpose
Structured research on how to build a pre-seed pitch deck for B2B software startups.
Synthesized from Y Combinator, Sequoia, a16z, First Round Capital, DocSend, Techstars, 500 Global, and others.

## File Map

- README.md — Project overview and quick-reference summary
- pitch-deck-framework-2026-03-19.md — Full 12-slide blueprint with slide-by-slide content guidance
- narrative-and-storytelling.md — Three-act story structure, headline advice, delivery principles
- pre-seed-vs-later-stages.md — How pre-seed decks differ from seed and Series A
- common-mistakes.md — Nine mistakes that sink pre-seed B2B decks
- slide-time-data.json — DocSend empirical VC time-on-slide data
- source-coverage-matrix.csv — Which sources cover which slides
- bibliography-2026-03-19.md — Full source list with URLs
- raw-research-notes-2026-03-19.md — Unstructured initial research dump (archived)

## Quick Answer Map

| Question | File |
|---|---|
| What slides should I include? | pitch-deck-framework-2026-03-19.md |
| How should the story flow? | narrative-and-storytelling.md |
| How is pre-seed different? | pre-seed-vs-later-stages.md |
| What mistakes to avoid? | common-mistakes.md |
| What do VCs spend time on? | slide-time-data.json |
| Which sources cover what? | source-coverage-matrix.csv |
| Where did this data come from? | bibliography-2026-03-19.md |
